elements.title: Washington State Ferries fleet
elements.contents: ... that the Washington State Ferries fleet (vessel pictured) uses names with tribal significance?

elements.title: En rejse til månen
elements.contents: ... that En rejse til månen, a 1973 amateur film made with Lego, was not released publicly until forty years after it was created?

elements.title: Andrea Margutti Trophy
elements.contents: ... that the Andrea Margutti Trophy was founded to commemorate a 14-year-old Italian kart racer who died while racing in 1989?

elements.title: Joseph Malke
elements.contents: ... that Joseph Malke argued for the Assyrians' right to music?

elements.title: Christian emigration from Israel and Palestine
elements.contents: ... that conflicting media coverage of Christian emigration from Israel and Palestine seeks to influence Western Christians?

elements.title: Joe Sterrett
elements.contents: ... that American college football coach Joe Sterrett graduated majoring in psychology and finance?

elements.title: a Pakistani teenager
elements.contents: ... that a Pakistani teenager had never heard of Islamabad, the capital of his own country, when he was arrested for terrorism in Afghanistan?

elements.title: a Swiss district's request to change cantons
elements.contents: ... that a Swiss district's request to change cantons needed to be confirmed by a nationwide referendum?

elements.title: Factor
elements.contents: ... that Factor's Hanzo track bike was priced at A$97,979 so that it would be too expensive to buy?
